mapper.select: SELECT id, name, sort_order, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM channel_groups WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, name, sort_order, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM channel_groups WHERE deleted = 0
AND name LIKE '%' || #{name} || '%'
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, sort_order, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM channel_groups WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO channel_groups (name, sort_order, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{sortOrder}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE channel_groups SET name = #{name}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
